name: Sprunki: Next Gen
description:
This is my first Sprunki bot, and yes, it's an AU I created myself, so enjoy it.

It's worth noting that I don't know how to explain Loren and Bella's relationship exactly, because they may be siblings, but they're a couple, so... well, I'll leave that up to you to see and give your opinion.

I'll update it depending on whether or not I add more Sprunkis to the AU.
creator: Alexander_234
